title: TriageOutput
description: Z3 — canonical agent-produced triage output. Stored on the Issue entity as a JSON column and emitted as the full payload of the andy.issues.events.issue.<id>.triaged event in Z4. Property names are snake_case to match EventJson serialisation across the Andy ecosystem (ADR 0001).

template_id.description: Classification picked from the four WorkflowTemplate seeds shared with andy-tasks (Epic AA, story AA2).

severity.description: Categorical severity. Drives retention (andy-tasks AD7) and Epic AC gating.

suggested_repo.description: Repository slug ("owner/repo"); a string rather than a Repository GUID because triage may propose a repo not yet known to the system. Null when no suggestion is made.

rationale.description: Short human-readable justification for the classification + severity. Required and non-empty.

inputs_docs_refs.description: DocsRefs into andy-docs (AJ2). Echoes the Z8 attachments on the Issue. Inherited as TaskNode.Inputs[] when andy-tasks creates the Goal from the triaged event.

initial_estimate.description: Cost/time estimate slot produced by the Z7 per-tenant learned model. All percentile fields are nullable; an empty slot ({}) is well-formed and means "not yet estimated".

schema_version.description: Schema version. Frozen at 1 for v1; additive/optional fields do not bump the version, but breaking changes (e.g. adding `version` to DocsRef) ship as triage-output.v2.json.

DocsRef.description: Pointer into andy-docs (AJ2 / AE1 reconciliation). DocumentId is the content reference; LinkId is the typed link row that scopes this reference to a specific Issue/Goal/etc.

EstimateSlot.description: Cost/time estimate slot. Shape matches andy-tasks Epic AI (AI1) so initial/planned/actual slots share one schema.
